coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 70% for 6:45. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 70% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: also known as 'why am I even here' pace. 6:45 at 70%.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 5:00 at 65%. Base training: the secret no one wants to do. That's why it works.

coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 5:00 at 65%. Base training: the secret weapon of every great cyclist.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: where excitement goes to retire. 5:00 of controlled boredom.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 13% complete. 39 minutes left. Let your mind wander. Stay in zone.
